services.title: AI and web powering your growth

about.title: Maison Siranno: The Architect of your Digital Success
about.description_1: Founded in Châteauneuf-sur-Loire, Maison Siranno is more than a development agency. We are the strategic partner for SMEs and craftspeople who refuse to settle for the status quo.
about.description_2: Our vision: bringing the technical excellence of large corporations to local business owners. We build digital ecosystems designed to last, perform, and free up your time.
why_items: AI innovation in service of your profitability

testimonials.title: They trust us
testimonials.subtitle: Local partners who have taken the leap into digital.

expertise_page.subtitle: Six complementary areas of expertise — web, automation, AI, marketing, consulting & training, continuous monitoring — serving ambitious businesses in Loire Valley and beyond. Every service is tailored, with no compromise.

agency_page.title: The Agency
agency_page.subtitle: A rare background spanning financial markets, construction, and digital excellence. Maison Siranno embodies the rigour of financial markets, the reality of hands-on experience, and the craftsman's precision — all in service of your growth.

data_driven.title: Data-driven
data_driven.description: Every decision is backed by concrete data. A legacy of financial markets: nothing is left to chance.

custom.title: Bespoke
custom.description: Every solution is designed specifically for you. No templates, no copy-paste.

human.title: Human
human.description: A single point of contact, available and responsive. Technology in service of human relationships.

roi.title: ROI-Obsessed
roi.description: Return on investment is the central metric of every project. Beauty for beauty's sake is never enough.

agency_page.expertise_title: Industry Expertise as a Concrete Advantage
agency_page.expertise_body_1: Former financial markets trader, then construction and logistics professional, before founding Maison Siranno — this unusual background is no coincidence. It forges a unique approach: data-driven, ROI-obsessed, and deeply grounded in operational realities.
agency_page.expertise_body_2: I know what it means to make decisions under pressure, to read figures that truly matter, to manage deadlines and teams. When you tell me about your challenges, I understand before you've even finished your sentence. This situational intelligence makes all the difference.
expertise_checkpoints: Data-driven approach inherited from financial markets
Immediate understanding of operational business challenges
Solutions designed for ROI, not aesthetics alone
A single point of contact, available and ROI-obsessed
agency_page.expertise_quote: The rigour of finance, the reality of the field, the precision of digital.
agency_page.founder_bio: Former trader, construction and logistics professional, turned web developer and AI specialist. An unusual background that forges a unique approach: data-driven, ROI-obsessed, and deeply human. Every artisan, retailer and SME deserves tools equal to their ambition.
agency_page.network_subtitle: Maison Siranno doesn't work alone. For every project, we engage the right partner at the right time — guaranteeing sharp expertise at every stage, never compromising on quality.

partners.label: Graphic Designer & Artist

partners.description: Business cards, flyers, posters, roll-ups and print materials

partners.label: Copywriter
partners.description: Web copy, brand storytelling, converting landing pages

partners.label: Analytics Expert
partners.description: Data viz, dashboards, tracking and multi-channel attribution

partners.label: Legal Advisor
partners.description: GDPR, T&Cs, legal notices, protection of digital creations

agency_page.vision_body_1: Because business owners driving local economies deserve tools built with the same rigour as those used by major financial institutions — without the Wall Street price tag, and with all the artisanal care.
agency_page.vision_body_2: Maison Siranno is the alliance of financial rigour, operational intelligence and technical excellence. Every project is an investment — we make sure it is a profitable one.

cookie_banner.title: Your data, our commitment
cookie_banner.body: We use Formspree to process your contact data (name, email, phone, message). We plan to integrate analytics tools in the future.
